summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Makerise Innovations INCEPT-1 landing page with GreenJets-inspired design. All backend APIs and frontend features working excellently with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Contact form submission API integration (POST /api/contact - 200 response)
Contact form validation with invalid data (422 error handling)
Green accent color (#2CFF95) usage throughout site
Hero section with PPT printer image and floating animation
Features section with 4 vector icon cards (Lucide icons)
Product section with 4 labeled PPT images (Complete Assembly, Luer-Lock, Pump, Servo Valve)
Applications section with 4 vector icon cards only (no photos)
Contact form frontend with all required fields
Framer Motion animations (64 animated elements detected)
Footer with contact information and social links

success_percentage.integration: 100% (contact form successfully integrates with backend API)
